name: Kinetic Group Inc.
summary: Kinetic Group Inc. operates as a full service integrated digital marketing agency to small and medium business customers in the United States. It offers a range of Web services, including Web marketing, social and viral marketing campaign, search engine optimization consulting, custom Web design, Website usability consulting, and Web analytics implementation services, as well as pay-per-click management services. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Orlando, Florida.
